allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Make authentication required for all app access

- Move login page to root path \(/\) as initial landing page
- Create ProtectedRoute component to guard all protected routes
- Redirect unauthenticated users to /auth from any protected route
- Remove duplicate authentication checks from individual pages
- Update navigation links to point to /dashboard instead of /
- Ensure onboarding completion is enforced for protected routes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix Auth page error - add missing destructured variables

- Add profile and loading to useAuth destructuring
- Fixes runtime error on landing page

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
